arabic: الْقُرْآنُ الْكَرِيمُ كِتَابُ الْمُسْلِمِينَ الْمُقَدَّسُ وَيَحْتَوِي عَلَى مَئَةٍ وَأَرْبَعَ عَشْرَةَ سُورَةً.
translation: Kur'an Plemeniti je sveta knjiga muslimana i sadrži stotinu i četrnaest sura.
translationEn: The Holy Quran is the sacred book of Muslims and contains one hundred and fourteen suras.
